SEARCH

Uses of Package
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.identity

Packages that use org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.identity
Package
Description
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine
Public API of the Camunda Platform engine.

Typical usage of the API starts by the creation of a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngineConfiguration
(typically based on a configuration file), from which a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngine
can be obtained.

Through the services obtained from such a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngine
, BPM and workflow operation can be executed:

invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.RepositoryService
: Manages
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.repository.Deployment
s
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.RuntimeService
: For starting and searching
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.runtime.ProcessInstance
s
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.TaskService
: Exposes operations to manage human (standalone)
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.task.Task
s, such as claiming, completing and assigning tasks
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.IdentityService
: Used for managing
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.identity.User
s,
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.identity.Group
s and the relations between them
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ManagementService
: Exposes engine admin and maintenance operations, which have no relation to the runtime execution of business processes
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.HistoryService
: Exposes information about ongoing and past process instances.
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.FormService
: Access to form data and rendered forms for starting new process instances and completing tasks.
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.identity
classes related to the
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.IdentityService
.
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl
API implementation classes, which shouldn't directly be used by end-users.
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.cfg.auth

org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.spring.boot.starter.property
 
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.spring.boot.starter.security.oauth2.impl
 
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.spring.boot.starter.util
 
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.identity used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine
    Class
    Description
    Group
    Represents a group, used in IdentityService.
    GroupQuery
    Allows to programmatically query for Groups.
    NativeUserQuery
    Allows querying of Users via native (SQL) queries
    PasswordPolicy
    Contains a list of rules that must be matched by passwords for engine-managed users.
    PasswordPolicyResult
    The result of a password which was checked against a PasswordPolicy.
    Picture
     
    Tenant
    Represents a tenant, used in IdentityService.
    TenantQuery
    Allows to programmatically query for Tenants.
    User
    Represents a user, used in IdentityService.
    UserQuery
    Allows programmatic querying of User
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.identity used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.identity
    Class
    Description
    GroupQuery
    Allows to programmatically query for Groups.

    Describes a rule of a PasswordPolicy.
    TenantQuery
    Allows to programmatically query for Tenants.
    User
    Represents a user, used in IdentityService.
    UserQuery
    Allows programmatic querying of User
